name: Classic T-Shirt
repair_instructions: Sew small holes with cotton thread
storytelling: [{"title":"Sustainable sourcing","body":"Made from certified organic cotton grown without synthetic pesticides, ginned and spun in Turkey."},{"title":"Crafted to last","body":"Cut and sewn in Portugal under fair-labour conditions, built to survive hundreds of washes."},{"title":"End of life","body":"Fully recyclable - drop it in a textile recycling bin to give the fibres a second life."}]

name: Eco Denim Jacket
description: Recycled denim trucker jacket with recycled polyester lining
care_instructions: Wash at 30°C inside out, do not tumble dry
repair_instructions: Patch tears, replace buttons or the zipper
storytelling: [{"title":"Recycled by design","body":"Woven from recycled cotton and recycled polyester, keeping textile waste out of landfill."},{"title":"Built to be repaired","body":"Replaceable buttons and a replaceable zipper plus a roomy cut make this jacket easy to mend and re-wear for years."},{"title":"Circular end of life","body":"When it is truly worn out, the panels can be recovered through textile recycling."}]
